note: the March CI red was a timezone flake in day formatting, not a logic bug: the suite was green in UTC runners and red on a west-of-UTC laptop. reviewed fix direction is to make formatting timezone-independent at the source. pinning a timezone via environment in the tests or npm scripts was explicitly rejected in review because it hides the same bug for every other caller of the formatter
schedcore stores every instant as a UTC Date; a day string is meant to name the UTC calendar day of that instant, so two callers in different zones must agree on the output
CI runs node --test on node 20; keep schedcore dependency-free so there is no date library to configure
